prompt: Two sorting robots coordinate on a conveyor. If a package is misaligned, SorterA stops the belt while SorterB repositions it. Once corrected, both return to normal operation. Belt must not stop for more than 10 seconds.
constraints: SorterA stops conveyor when misalignment detected
SorterB corrects package alignment before resuming
SorterA returns to normal operation once the package is corrected
SorterB returns to normal operation once the package is corrected
Conveyor must not stop for more than 10 seconds

results.constraint: SorterA stops conveyor when misalignment detected

generation.raw_text:
{
    "query": "(SorterA.misalignment_detected) --> (SorterA.conveyor_stop)",
    "explanation": "The UPPAAL query translates the condition where SorterA detects a misalignment, which triggers an eventual response of stopping the conveyor. This matches the constraint as it correctly models the conditional relationship and uses the exact robot name.",
    "confidence": 0.85,
    "pattern_used": "conditional_response",
    "operator_used": ["-->"]
}

uppaal_result.explanation: The UPPAAL query translates the condition where SorterA detects a misalignment, which triggers an eventual response of stopping the conveyor. This matches the constraint as it correctly models the conditional relationship and uses the exact robot name.

results.constraint: Conveyor must not stop for more than 10 seconds

generation.raw_text:

    "query": "A[] (Conveyor.stopped imply Conveyor.stopped_duration <= 10)",

    "confidence": 0.85,
    "pattern_used": "safety_immediate_response",
    "operator_used": ["imply"]
  }

uppaal_result.explanation: This query enforces that whenever the conveyor stops, it must do so for no longer than 10 seconds. It uses the immediate implication to ensure compliance with safety standards.
